description: If you want a bag that's funky, stylish, super cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this blue and black backpack from nike. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A stunningly good looking bag, with loads of space, it'll become your best buddy in no time. Be prepared to be swept off your feet by this awesome backpack!Height: 46 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 16 cmMade of 74% polyester and 20% nylon for enhanced durability and styleNylon lining for increased durabilityTwo main zipped compartments to accommodate all your essentials with an organiser sleeveOne zipped pocket with nike swoosh printed on the frontA fold over design on the front for styleOne zipped pocket on one side and a mesh pocket on the other sidePadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyNike Swoosh in stitch detailing on the strapHaul loop for handling easeBranded zips and sliders for easy useCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
